user.title: Danelfin AI Stock Scores
user.description: Click Submit to install the integration. Add stock tickers afterwards via the Configure button.

abort.already_configured: Danelfin is already installed. Use the Configure button to add tickers.

add_ticker.title: Add stock ticker
add_ticker.description: Enter a ticker symbol (e.g. {example}). Each ticker will appear as a separate device with 9 sensors.

error.ticker: Invalid ticker symbol. Use 1–5 uppercase letters.
error.already_tracked: This ticker is already being tracked.
